ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the clinical trial started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the clinical trial ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical trial */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled, observational) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase I, Phase II) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clinical trial (e.g., recruiting, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the treatment */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method of administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparators" (
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparator */,
  "comparator_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comparator */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the comparator */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method of administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the outcome */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the outcome (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparator */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate */,
  "target_mean_before" REAL /* Mean value of the target before treatment */,
  "comparator_mean_before" REAL /* Mean value of the comparator before treatment */,
  "std_diff_before" REAL /* Standard difference before treatment */,
  "target_mean_after" REAL /* Mean value of the target after treatment */,
  "comparator_mean_after" REAL /* Mean value of the comparator after treatment */,
  "std_diff_after" REAL /* Standard difference after treatment */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "statistical_method" TEXT /* Statistical method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_comparator_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparator_id") REFERENCES comparators ("comparator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covariates" (
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covariate */,
  "covariate_name" TEXT /* Name of the covariate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the covariate */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the covariate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covariate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparator */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "covariate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the covariate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "inclusion_criteria_met" INTEGER /* Whether inclusion criteria were met */,
  "exclusion_criteria_met" INTEGER /* Whether exclusion criteria were met */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_covariate_id FOREIGN KEY ("covariate_id") REFERENCES covariates ("covariate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_comparator_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparator_id") REFERENCES comparators ("comparator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date the data point was collected */,
  "data_point_type" TEXT /* Type of data point (e.g., primary outcome, secondary outcome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inclusion_criteria" (
  "inclusion_criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inclusion criterion */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inclusion criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inclusion_criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusion_criteria" (
  "exclusion_criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion criterion */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exclusion criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_criteria_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each clinical trial
Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled, observational)
Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase I, Phase II)
Status of the clinical trial (e.g., recruiting, completed)
Unit of measure for the outcome
Data type of the outcome (e.g., continuous, categorical)
Mean value of the target before treatment
Mean value of the comparator before treatment
Mean value of the target after treatment
Mean value of the comparator after treatment
Unique identifier for each data point
Date the data point was collected
Type of data point (e.g., primary outcome, secondary outcome)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the researcher accessing the data
Date when the data was accessed
ID of the researcher who generated the report
Unique identifier for each inclusion criterion
Unique identifier for each exclusion criterion
